name: skill-pilot-skill
description: SkillPilot — intelligent task routing for AI agents, auto-detects skills and routes tasks. Scans skills, agents, and MCP tools, then auto-selects the best tool for each task.

plugins.name: skill-pilot
plugins.description: Intelligent task-to-tool router — auto-detects installed tools and routes tasks to the best skill, agent, or MCP tool
